    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.Builder
    OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.Builder.additionalParameter(String key, String value)
    Adds a custom parameter to the token request (optional).
    OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.Builder
    OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.Builder.additionalParameters(Map<String,String> additionalParameters)
    Sets all custom parameters for the token request (optional).
    OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.Builder
    OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.Builder.audience(String audience)
    Sets the OAuth2 audience parameter (optional).
    static OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.Builder
    OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.builder()
     
    OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.Builder
    OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.Builder.clientAssertionProvider(ClientAssertionProvider clientAssertionProvider)
    Sets a ClientAssertionProvider for JWT Bearer client authentication.
    OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.Builder
    OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.Builder.clientId(String clientId)
    Sets the OAuth2 client ID (required).
    OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.Builder
    OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.Builder.clientSecret(String clientSecret)
    Sets the client secret for client_secret_post authentication.
    OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.Builder
    OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.Builder.expiryBuffer(Duration expiryBuffer)
    Sets how long before token expiry a refresh should be triggered (default: 30 seconds).
    OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.Builder
    OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.Builder.httpClient(org.apache.hc.client5.http.impl.classic.CloseableHttpClient httpClient)
    Sets a custom CloseableHttpClient for token requests (optional).
    OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.Builder
    OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.Builder.objectMapper(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper objectMapper)
    Sets a custom ObjectMapper for parsing token responses (optional).
    OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.Builder
    OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.Builder.resource(String resource)
    Sets the OAuth2 resource parameter (optional).
    OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.Builder
    OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.Builder.scope(String scope)
    Sets the OAuth2 scope(s) to request (optional).
    OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.Builder
    OAuth2ClientCredentialsProvider.Builder.tokenUri(String tokenUri)
    Sets the OAuth2 token endpoint URI (required).
